visualGoal: Make a civil MSFS 2024 simmer confident a stick-and-throttle is a legitimate (and cheaper) alternative to a yoke, matched to what they fly. Real product proof throughout for verified picks; honest text-only treatment for the premium/entry products without a verified flight photo.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: A flight-folder file exists on disk but is NOT in verified-product-images.json, so it cannot be embedded. A verified copy exists at /images/gear/space/thrustmaster-hotas-warthog.jpg. Either add the flight-folder path to the verified set (after vision-verifying it matches) or copy the verified space photo to a flight path. Until then the Warthog is text-and-link only, matching the reference gold article's treatment.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The article's smart-money value pick, currently text-only. Only /space/ Gladiator variants (Space Combat Edition, Omni Throttle) are verified. Needs a real GA/EVO-grip base photo before it can carry a gearpick/shotgrid in the flight bay.
Modular premium pick. No verified image on file. Text-only until a real photo is sourced.
Entry-tier pick. No verified image. Text-only for now.
PC-only all-in-one, mentioned to disambiguate from the Xbox Flight Stick. Low priority; text-only.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic home flight-sim desk at blue-hour monitor glow, a clean desk-edge with an empty mounting spot left open for a real flight-stick product overlay, MSFS 2024 cockpit blurred on a widescreen monitor behind, curator Mac Donovan gesturing at the stick position, cable tray visible, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake joystick, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: Which HOTAS for what you fly
content: GA + airliners -> a yoke, not a HOTAS
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center decision chart, large readable text, flight palette, real product photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: HOTAS buy order
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult flight-sim curator Mac Donovan at a tidy home cockpit desk, one hand on a flight stick, other hand pointing at a monitor showing a controls-mapping menu, calm instructor energy, product overlay space beside the stick, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.purpose: Illustrate the MSFS 2024 controls/bindings menu referenced in the binding-fix callout, so readers recognize the profile-swap problem.
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Neutral in-sim UI capture only; no fabricated UI. Optional supporting visual, not required for certification.
